title: Quiet office establish
goal: Introduce the therapy room, the panda's emotional heaviness, and the calm relationship between patient and psychologist.

title: Stillness before the confession
goal: Hold the same composed wide setup with a subtle settling-in beat just before the panda begins to speak.

title: Panda opens up
goal: Move into a medium shot on the panda as she begins describing how rejected she feels.

title: Line lands as a wound
goal: End on the panda holding the emotional weight of her line so it plays as sincere pain rather than a gag.

title: Psychologist listens
goal: Show the psychologist receiving the confession with calm, attentive presence before responding.

title: Gentle redirect inward
goal: Land the psychologist's question with warmth and precision, shifting the conversation toward introspection.

title: Panda caught by the question
goal: Return to the panda in a tighter shot at the moment she absorbs the therapist's question.

title: Exposed honesty
goal: Capture the vulnerable beat where the panda admits, 'Neither,' and her self-protection cracks.

title: Shared frame of understanding
goal: Reunite panda and psychologist in a warm, intimate composition as the emotional distance between them closes.

title: Quiet hopeful resolve
goal: Hold the closing line in a steady, compassionate frame that leaves the first hint of healing.
